catalog_content:
Item Name: MASTER OF MIXES Blue Hawaiian Mix, Ready to Use, 96 oz BigBucket Bullet Point 1: AUTHENTIC RECIPE: Paradise classic combines the citrus notes from lemons and limes and the tropical flavors of premium pineapple juice with a rich coconut finish - just add rum Bullet Point 2: SO EASY: Every Low-Profile BigBucket features the exclusive, patented Dispensa-Rita spout and a vented lid for the ultimate mobile cocktail convenience. Bullet Point 3: JUST ADD ALCOHOL: 750 ml of your favorite rum to get the party started! By simply adding one 750 ml bottle of rum, you get nearly one gallon of finished Blue Hawaiian. Non-alcoholic drink mixer. Does not contain alcohol. Bullet Point 4: HOWEVER YOU WANT IT: Traditionally served on the rocks, but pop the Low Profile BigBucket container in the freezer for a delightful frozen Blue Hawaiian Bullet Point 5: GET THE PARTY STARTED: Perfect for parties, camping, tailgating, picnics, poolside, boating and any other outdoor activities parties! Product Description: America's Favorite Bucket...Just got Blue! Just add rum and this paradise classic comes to life to combine the citrus notes from lemons and limes and the tropical flavors of premium pineapple juice with a rich coconut finish! Traditionally served on the rocks, Low Profile Big Bucket Blue Hawaiian is delicious frozen as well. Featuring the exclusive Dispensa-Rita spout for chilled margaritas ANYTIME! Pop BigBucket container in the refrigerator for the perfect Blue Hawaiian on the rocks, INSTANTLY. OR Pop Low Profile BigBucket container in the freezer, for a delightful frozen Blue Hawaiian.

The Low Profile package size provides all the same delicious Master of Mixes BigBucket flavor, in a shorter package that fits perfectly in the refrigerator or freezer or cooler. Value: 96.0 Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Large-volume cocktail mixer positioned for party and event use, emphasizing convenience and versatility. Standard plastic packaging with no premium or organic claims suggests mid-range pricing. Value-oriented due to high volume and party-focused marketing.

catalog_content:
Item Name: Daiya Dairy Free Creamy Caesar Salad Dressing, Gluten Free Plant Based Condiment, Vegan Dipping Sauce, 8.36 oz (Pack of 6)
Bullet Point 1: MORE THAN JUST A VEGAN SALAD DRESSING - Enjoy Daiya's dairy free dressings as a tasty topping on veggie burgers or sandwiches, or serve as a rich, creamy, dairy free dipping sauce for veggies, chips and more.
Bullet Point 2: ALLERGY-FRIENDLY SALAD DRESSINGS - Invite everyone to the table. Daiya's dairy free salad dressings are gluten free, soy free, egg free, and peanut free. Non-GMO Project Verified.
Bullet Point 3: FRESH PLANT BASED FLAVOR - We use only the finest plant based ingredients in this lusciously creamy dairy free salad dressing. No artificial colors, flavors, or preservatives, and 0 mg of cholesterol.
Bullet Point 4: PURE VEGAN GOODNESS - Follow a vegan diet? You'll be glad to know that your Daiya dairy free salad dressing contains no animal products or by-products, and is Certified Plant-Based by Plant Based Foods Association. Comes in a recyclable glass bottle.
Bullet Point 5: TRY ALL 5 FLAVORS - Daiya's non dairy salad dressings are available in five delicious flavors: Homestyle Ranch, Creamy Caesar, Blue Cheeze, Hon'y Mustard and Creamy Italian. Treat your taste buds to these rich and creamy salad dressings.
Value: 50.16
Unit: Ounce
product_name: Dairy Free Creamy Caesar Salad Dressing
overall_summary: Plant-based, allergy-friendly salad dressing positioned as a versatile condiment for vegan and gluten-free consumers. Multi-pack offering provides value for bulk purchases, with recyclable glass packaging indicating eco-conscious branding. Non-GMO and plant-based certifications suggest premium positioning within the vegan category.
